name: Memphis Style Basting Sauce for Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients well.
2. Baste the ribs every half hour or so.
3. This baste keeps well in a large gallon glass bottle (like a vinegar bottle).
Note: This recipe, along with the following recipes, will provide you with the most mouth-watering ribs you've ever locked a lip on.
